subject: feat(theme): change default dark theme from black to dracula
body:
Dracula is a more popular and developer-friendly dark theme. Users who
have already persisted a dark theme choice in localStorage are unaffected;
this only changes the out-of-box default for new visitors.

Tags: ui, theme
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: theming
Semver: minor

title: change default dark theme from black to dracula
